Text.Page:
Here's the materials. We need leatherworker's cuirasses. Lots of them. There's no time to waste.

Quick as you can, bring them back to me.

Nice, very nice. This is fine work, .

I'd say they're ready for the field. Deliver the cuirasses to Prefect Daven in Lumbertown. He needs all the armor he can get.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
You've brought good suits of armor just in time. I've got an army of archers who can put them to good use. Many thanks!
